hooks.command: case "$TOOL_INPUT" in *config/development.env*|*config/local.env*|*.env.production*|*config/.env*) echo 'BLOCKED: Cannot edit environment config files containing secrets. Add to .gitignore instead.' >&2; exit 1;; esac; exit 0

FILE_PATH=$(echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -o '"file_path"[[:space:]]*:[[:space:]]*"[^"]*"' | head -1 | sed 's/.*"\([^"]*\)"$/\1/'); case "$FILE_PATH" in */database/migrations/*) BASENAME=$(basename "$FILE_PATH"); if ! echo "$BASENAME" | grep -qE '^[0-9]+__[a-z_]+\.sql$'; then echo "BLOCKED: Migration filename must match NN__description.sql (e.g. 39__add_new_table.sql)" >&2; exit 1; fi;; esac; exit 0
